name: Fenix 2.0 Vaporizer
summary: A full-convection dry-herb portable with a big battery and adjustable temperature, for patients who want clean flavour and all-day runtime.
description: The Fenix 2.0 uses full convection — its AIR HEATING system passes hot air through the herb rather than baking it against a hot wall — which gives cleaner flavour and a more even extraction. A cooling path takes the edge off the vapour, and the 4400mAh battery is large enough to last a full day of medicating. Temperature is adjustable from 160 to 220C with a roughly 30-second heat-up. For a UK patient who values convection flavour and long runtime, the Fenix 2.0 is a solid, dependable choice — the main compromise is older Micro USB charging rather than USB-C.
